subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by the resplendent rays of the Sun of Thy oneness, the first Light of the dawn of Thy transcendence
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بانوار شمس وحدانیتک و طلوع فجر فردانیتک ثم بکلمتک
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
